title: Ability to rename Main Table
excerpt: I would really like to have the ability to rename the Main Table. I have certain extra columns that I don’t’ want to show on the main board as they only apply to a specific team which is set up in another view.

posts.author: GeorgiaShort7 (Georgia Short)
posts.cookedHtml: I would really like to have the ability to rename the Main Table. I have certain extra columns that I don’t’ want to show on the main board as they only apply to a specific team which is set up in another view.

posts.author: sivi (Sivan Rinat)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be very useful, it is confusing and difficult to teach new team members to ignore the Main Table which includes a lot of extra back-end columns. The name makes it confusing.

posts.author: Dagmar (Dagmar)
posts.cookedHtml: Definitely the possibility to rename the ‘Main Table’ view and also the possibility the hide it from view to non-board owners.
